attributes.action: Create a Formal Military and Economic Coalition between 🇬🇧🇫🇷🇩🇪🇮🇹🇵🇱.
attributes.additional_details: Major world powers are acting fast. The UK must do the same. We share common beliefs and values with many of the so-called middle powers. I propose that we initiate a European coalition before looking to expand to the rest of the Anglosphere e.g Australia, New Zealand, Canada, as well as Japan and South Korea. This is a movement that a formal institution such as the Government must push for to gain any meaningful traction. This coalition will allow the country to be less reliant on 🇺🇸 and 🇨🇳
attributes.background: With major wars in Europe and the Middle East, on top of increasingly fragile relationships with a core member of NATO, the USA, we must look to the middle powers of Europe and elsewhere for security and strength. Forming a formal economic and military coalition will help strengthen our continent.

rejection.details:
Propose the creation of a new defence treaty in Europe as an alternative to NATO
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/758720
